/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/csv_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/execution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/sweep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest.dir/src/kalshi_fetch.cpp.o -o kalshi_backtest
